ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, borders, button outlines, structural strokes — the only color that ever carries information

paper.$description: Paper — Card surfaces, thumbnail covers, inverted text on dark blocks

carbon.$description: Carbon — Dark project tile backgrounds, near-black surface for video panels

bone-gray.$description: Bone Gray — Page canvas, neutral button fills — the warm gray the whole composition sits on

studio-indigo.$description: Studio Indigo — Sole chromatic accent — STUDIO pill badge, and any deep brand punctuation. The only saturated color in the system

helvetica.$description: Every utility, body, list, button, and link on the site. Stays at one weight — no bold, no medium. The decision to use weight 400 Helvetica at 20px for body (not 16px) is deliberate: text is meant to feel like printed matter, not a UI. Tighter letter-spacing on larger sizes (-0.03em) prevents the 40px from feeling airy.

caslon.$description: The hero wordmark and any serif accent. A single weight of a custom display serif — chosen because its high contrast strokes and ball terminals read as editorial print, not web type. This font IS the brand; everything else is scaffolding.

sometimes-times.$description: Sometimes Times — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

bone-gray-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Page background — the warm off-white paper the whole site rests on

paper-card.$description: Surface level 2: White card surfaces for project details, inline blocks

carbon-plate.$description: Surface level 3: Dark video panels and feature blocks for contrast sections

studio-indigo-plate.$description: Surface level 4: Indigo badge and any accent wash
